_Agent Harness Deploy_note: Auto-generated MCP config template by Agent Harness Deploy. Merges with your existing .mcp.json. Uncomment servers you want to enable.

mcpServers._comment_chroma_hybrid_search: Hybrid retrieval (BM25 + ChromaDB vector + BGE-Reranker) over ~/.deep-memory. Requires: pip install -r distill/skills/chroma-hybrid-search/requirements.txt

chroma-hybrid-search._enable_instructions: Set _disabled to false after installing requirements

mcpServers._comment_codebase_memory: Codebase knowledge graph (tree-sitter + Hybrid LSP). Optional companion tool. Install from https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp

codebase-memory-mcp._enable_instructions: Install from https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp, then set _disabled to false
